fields.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY:

Ready to shape the future of work?

You’ll be the product lead in a cross-functional squad, working hand-in-hand with talented designers and engineers to turn deep user insights into impactful product experiences. We run a true product engineering model, and this is a hands-on role: you’ll drive discovery, strategy, delivery, and iteration. The scope is broad, the impact is real, and you’ll ship fast and learn quickly.

We’re a fast-paced, low-hierarchical, and ambitious team. It’s a small setup, so you’ll have visibility and impact from day one. We’re looking for someone who brings fresh ideas and pushes us to evolve. As a senior individual contributor, you’ll help raise the bar, filling long-term capability gaps and leading the way in how we use emerging tech like AI and LLMs to power discovery, experimentation, and execution.

If you’re entrepreneurial, customer-obsessed, and love getting into the details while driving big outcomes, you’ll thrive here. We’ll challenge you to grow — and support you every step of the way.


WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Take end-to-end ownership: Lead your product area from discovery to launch and beyond. You’ll be hands-on every step of the way, validating ideas, scoping solutions, writing tickets, and ensuring smooth delivery.

 - Shape product strategy: Partner with our Head of Product to define and communicate a clear vision for your area, grounded in customer needs, market trends, and business goals.

 - Own the roadmap: Define, prioritize, and deliver a high-impact roadmap. Collaborate with engineering, design, and others to ship features that solve real problems.

 - Know the market: Stay ahead of industry trends and competitors. Use research and data to make smart, confident product decisions.

 - Stay close to customers: Talk to users often. Gather insights, validate problems, and turn feedback into meaningful improvements.

 - Foster collaboration: Help build a culture of learning, excellence, and knowledge-sharing across your squad and the broader product team.


WHAT WE NEED YOU TO BRING:

 - High-Agency Ownership: You operate with the scrappy, low-ego mindset of a founder, taking full responsibility for navigating ambiguity and unblocking yourself to drive products from raw idea to high-impact launch.

 - Strategic Growth Intuition: You instinctively balance high-level SaaS strategy with hands-on execution, ruthlessly prioritizing the 20% of effort that will move the needle on core business outcomes like activation and retention.

 - Domain-Agnostic Mastery: With 5+ years of B2B SaaS experience, you are a "product chameleon" capable of dropping into any complex problem space—from deep infrastructure to user-facing growth loops—and bringing immediate structural clarity.

 - Bias for Action: You thrive in fast-paced environments, making smart, decisive calls with limited information and maintaining a relentless focus on shipping over perfect clarity.

 - Continuous Evolution: You are obsessed with the "Product Craft," proactively experimenting with new technologies like AI and seeking radical feedback to constantly elevate your own performance and the company’s standards.

 - Data-Fluent Discovery: You are a power user of product analytics and logic, using quantitative signals and sharp user insights to validate "the why" before committing a single line of engineering effort.



Leapsome’s values

We stay true to our values in everything we do at Leapsome. 

 - Impact is everything — We aim high, focus on the outcomes that matter and say no to the rest.

 - Speed is our advantage — We move fast with intent — simplifying, automating, and learning as we go.

 - Owners without egos — We trust owners and expect excellence in return. We take responsibility individually, support each other, and win as a team.

 - Candid is kind — We speak up early and respectfully. We assume good intent, stay curious, and care about each other’s growth.
   
   

Excited to be part of Leapsome? 😊

Just send us your CV. You won't need to input any information already mentioned on your CV later on - promise! 🤙

A cover letter isn’t necessary, but we’d really appreciate a brief answer to these questions: Why Leapsome? Why you?

We look forward to getting to know you!

You can find more about what our colleagues think about working at Leapsome here 👉 ✨✨✨ Glassdoor https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Leapsome-Reviews-E2368390.htm?countryRedirect=true ✨✨✨ Kununu https://www.kununu.com/de/leapsome2✨✨✨

Don’t meet every single requirement? Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply for jobs unless they meet every qualification. If you’re excited about this role but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.


Help us make work fulfilling for everyone!

At Leapsome, we want work to be the best it can be for everyone. We help companies create environments where people can achieve shared goals, build authentic relationships, learn, and grow together.

Put simply; our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone. And we know how to get there. But we can only do this by “walking our talk” and building a diverse and inclusive company where people — not just the business — thrive.



Apply now 👇 or keep scrolling to read more about what makes Leapsome a unique workplace!
fields.title: Lead Product Manager (d/f/m)
